Email: calymadi@gmail.com
Phone: (318) 587-0243
Comments: We are a family who YHVH graciously revealed His truth to and are seeking to walk in that truth wherever it shall lead us. We are learning to walk in and embrace Torah and continue to proclaim Yeshua as our Messiah. We are trying to use a very balanced approach along with much wisdom navigating our way out of the current world system; for our children's sake and others we come into contact with. We respect our brother Judah because he has safeguarded the Law and helped bring it forth into the current age. We respect our brothers/sisters still in mainstream Christianity, because we too once identified with them and understand that no one comes to this walk unless the Father reveals it. We hope to hold fast to what is good and what is true, YHVH's Law + Love and believe that our Messiah beautifully illustrated that for us at his first coming. We recognize that there are some divisive issues that can come up in this walk; examples being the true names of our Creator and Messiah, and the Calendar. On topics such as those, we can respect many view points but ultimately feel that this is something that must be searched out and fully convinced by each individual. We would like to fellowship with other like minded individuals on this path. Iron sharpens iron, and we have been on this path long enough to know it can become quite wearisome battling the world alone. We don't believe in forced relationships. Though we may have arrived at the same conclusion on our spiritual walks, sometimes personalities just don't jive for one reason or another. If we are blessed to meet other scattered Israelites, we would be grateful. However, if for some reason our personalities are just disagreeable for whatever reason, let us depart from one another in peace and love, not anger and contention. ~Shalom!

Comments: Our goal at the Way Congregation is to simply walk as Jesus taught. We believe we are filling a gap between Judah (Messianic Jews) and Ephraim (the gentile church) by taking the wholesome and biblical aspects from each. We love grace! We want the world to know our God is gracious and has paid for our sins through the blood of Yeshua. We also love Gods instructions and we strive to live according to all that He has revealed and instructed us to do because His instructions lead to joy, peace, and prosperity. We want to focus on the majors without leaving the minors undone. While we love Shabbat, the feasts, and clean food -- but what defines us is our love and kindness. Furthermore, we believe the Bible is Gods Word and that it is completely inerrant and infallible and inspired: The people, places, events and miracles described in it were completely real and historical. We meet every Shabbat at Clear Creek Church at 10555 W. 44th Ave. in Wheat Ridge, CO. Check us out on Facebook and visit our website at TheWayCongregation.com.
